hero.hero_title_1: Run Any Database Natively on Nutanix Kubernetes Platform Without the Compromise.
hero.hero_description: Deploy and manage 25+ Production-grade databases as native Kubernetes resources on your Nutanix Kubernetes Platform. Leverage the full power of Nutanix Cloud Infrastructure (NCI) - with broader choice, lower cost, and true agility.
hero.primary_action_text: See full NDB vs KubeDB comparison

platform.heading: Your Nutanix Investment is Ready for Modern Databases
platform.description: NCI delivers unmatched hyperconverged performance and resilience. NKP brings enterprise-grade Kubernetes. KubeDB turns your stack into a powerful, open database platform.

cards.title: Nutanix Cloud Infrastructure (NCI)
cards.description: Hyperconverged foundation with AHV, AOS storage, and Prism management. Exceptional I/O performance, storage efficiency, and built-in disaster recovery.
features: Native CSI driver for Kubernetes workloads

cards.title: Nutanix Kubernetes Platform (NKP)
cards.description: Complete, production-ready Kubernetes with fleet management, GitOps, observability, and seamless integration with Nutanix storage and data services.

cards.title: Nutanix Database Service (NDB)
cards.description: Optimized for VM-based environments, with evolving support for cloud-native Kubernetes workloads.
cards.note: Excellent for traditional VMs. Less ideal for cloud-native Kubernetes workloads.

comparison.heading: NDB vs KubeDB on NKP - Detailed Comparison
comparison.description: See what additional capabilities KubeDB can offer to your Nutanix Kubernetes Platform

rows.traditional: ~8 core engines (Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, EDB...)
rows.kubedb: 25+ engines including PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, Kafka, Cassandra, ClickHouse, Neo4j, Milvus, Qdrant & more

rows.traditional: VM-centric DBaaS with a Kubernetes operator

rows.kubedb: Automated HA, read replicas, intelligent failover

rows.traditional: Excellent fast Nutanix snapshots & thin clones
rows.kubedb: Stash integration + Nutanix CSI volume snapshots, encrypted & deduplicated

rows.traditional: Thin, space-efficient zero-byte clones in minutes

rows.kubedb: Direct Nutanix CSI - sub-ms latency, erasure coding, dedup
Native NKP observability + Prometheus + DB-specific metrics
Same manifests work on NKP, NC2, or any CNCF Kubernetes

benefits.heading: Why Existing Nutanix Customers Choose KubeDB on NKP

items.title: Significantly Lower TCO
items.description: Only pay for the amount of Managed Database Memory(GB) while maximizing your existing Nutanix investment.

items.title: Developer-First Agility
items.description: Databases become Kubernetes objects. Enable self-service provisioning, GitOps workflows, and faster iteration, all while running alongside your microservices on NKP.

items.title: Enterprise Security & Operations
items.description: Built-in TLS, encryption, automated backups with Stash, high availability, and seamless integration with Nutanix microsegmentation and NKP security policies.

items.title: Full Nutanix Performance
items.description: Nutanix CSI provides blazing-fast persistent storage. Combine with NKP's monitoring and data services for complete lifecycle management.

items.title: Hybrid & Multi-Cloud Ready
items.description: Use identical manifests across on-premises NKP, NC2 on public clouds, or any CNCF Kubernetes, avoiding vendor lock-in common with traditional DBaaS.

items.title: Proven at Enterprise Scale
items.description: Trusted by organizations worldwide for production databases. Rapid innovation with commercial support, while protecting your Nutanix infrastructure investment.

architecture.heading: KubeDB runs natively on Nutanix Kubernetes Platform
architecture.description: The KubeDB Operator sits directly on top of your Nutanix Kubernetes Platform, leveraging Nutanix's hyperconverged infrastructure and high-performance storage capabilities.

layers.label: KubeDB Platform
layers.desc: Web Console • Envoy Gateway • Hub/Spoke Model • Policy Engine

layers.label: Kubernetes Services
layers.desc: ArgoCD • Open Cluster Management • Cert Manager • Prometheus • Grafana

architecture.image_alt: KubeDB Platform Architecture on Nutanix Kubernetes Platform

capabilities.heading: Key Capabilities of KubeDB on NKP

items.title: Automated Lifecycle Management
items.description: Declarative operators handle provisioning, upgrades, scaling, and repair with zero-downtime where possible.

items.title: High Availability & Resiliency
items.description: Multi-zone clustering, automated failover, PodDisruptionBudgets, and continuous health checks with NKP integration.

items.title: Backup & Recovery
items.description: Integrated with KubeStash for policy-driven, incremental, encrypted backups to S3-compatible storage. Support for point-in-time recovery.

items.title: Monitoring & Observability
items.description: Native Prometheus + Grafana dashboards. Integrates with NKP monitoring stack for complete visibility.

items.title: Security & Governance
items.description: Automated TLS, Transparent Data Encryption, RBAC integration, network policies, and Nutanix microsegmentation support.

items.title: Storage Optimization
items.description: Nutanix CSI with sub-millisecond latency, erasure coding, deduplication, and compression for maximum performance and efficiency.

database_support.heading: Comprehensive Database Support
database_support.description: 25+ Database engines managed with Kubernetes-native workflows

categories.label: Relational
categories.items: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, Percona XtraDB

cta.heading: Run Databases Natively
cta.description: FIPS 140-2 compliance, enterprise security, hybrid cloud deployment

features.text: Run anywhere: on-prem, cloud, or hybrid
